query:
INSERT INTO score (
                chatter_id,
                channel_id,
                score,
                updated_at
            )
            SELECT 
                chatter_id,
                channel_id, 
                COUNT(*), 
                NOW()
            FROM score_event 
            GROUP BY chatter_id, channel_id
            ON CONFLICT (chatter_id, channel_id)
            DO UPDATE SET 
                score = EXCLUDED.score, 
                updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
